steps.title: Read the x-intercept
steps.content: The plotted points form a line that passes through (16, 0). At this point, someone buys 16 cornflowers and 0 wallflowers for exactly \$24.

steps.title: Calculate the price per cornflower
steps.content:
When only cornflowers are purchased, 16 of them cost $24 total. Therefore:
$$\frac{24}{16} = \frac{3}{2} = 1.50$$
The price of one cornflower is \$1.50.
